expectedBehavior: Run an ACP agent whose promptHandler calls Claude (via the Anthropic Java SDK) instead of echoing. The demo client launches the ChatbotAgent as a subprocess, asks it to write a haiku about debugging code, then in the SAME session asks it to turn that haiku into a limerick. The agent should stream a genuine, non-echoed AI-generated response to each prompt, and the limerick should clearly be derived from the haiku (demonstrating per-session conversation memory). Each turn should end with stop reason END_TURN.
requiredOutput: You: Write a haiku about debugging code.
You: Now turn that haiku into a limerick.
